description: Paths to Glory Patch 4 (18 September 2024) — Albion Journal, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Albion Journal

items.text: Keep a city plot you own in an auction cycle → Bid 5 million Silver on a city plot you currently own

sections.searchable_text: Albion Journal Keep a city plot you own in an auction cycle → Bid 5 million Silver on a city plot you currently own

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Raging Blades (all Axes) Damage per tick: 28 → 26

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Deadly Shot (all Bows) Cooldown: 3s → 2s Energy cost: 4 → 3 Debuff duration: 6s → 5s Standtime: 0.4s → 0.3s

subsections.heading: Crossbows

subitems.text: Damage increase per hit: 9.2 → 5.4 (total damage unchanged)

subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Deathward Climax (Boltcasters) First tick damage: 9.2 → 30.1 Damage increase per hit: 9.2 → 5.4 (total damage unchanged)

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Fire Bolt (all Fire Staffs) Damage per tick: 5 → 4 Raging Flare (all Fire Staffs) Cooldown: 10s → 20s Energy cost: 9 → 16 Initial damage: 135 → 187 Damage per tick: 5.97 → 7.2

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Divine Intervention (Hallowfall) Cooldown reduction: 40% → 25% Celestial Sphere (Redemption Staff) Time between bounces: 0.6s → 0.9s

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Vendetta (Camlann Mace) Cast is now uninterruptible

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Elevated Nature (Blight Staff) Healing (alone): 36 → 33 Healing (at least one ally): 42 → 39 Spiritual Seed (Druidic Staff) Cooldown after recast: 30s → 25s

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Reality Fissure (all Shapeshifter staffs) First hit damage: 87 → 101 Second hit damage: 137 → 123 Wild Onslaught (Primal Staff) Fear duration: 1.2s → 1s Cast time: 0.3s → 0.6s

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Spectral Trident (Trinity Spear) Jump speed increased by 25% Standtime after landing: 0.5s → 0.35s

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Soulless Stream (Galatine Pair) Enemy health reduction: 6% → 10% 0 stack damage: 88.2 → 90 1 stack damage: 140.7 → 145 2 stack damage: 211.05 → 215 3 stack damage: 299.25 → 305

subsections.heading: Helmets

subitems.text: Buff no longer expires if no damage is dealt after reaching max stacks

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Growing Rage (Royal Hood) Cooldown: 30s → 25s Buff no longer expires if no damage is dealt after reaching max stacks

subsections.heading: Armors

subitems.text: Now increases damage resistances by 40% while channeling

subsections.searchable_text: Armors Electric Field (Stalker Jacket) Cooldown: 30s → 40s Requite (Armor of Valor) Now increases damage resistances by 40% while channeling

subsections.heading: Other

items.text: Immunity bubble after changing regions now also prevents debuffs and damage-over-time effects from being applied
Being forcefully dismounted now cleanses crowd control and transformation effects, and provides a two-second immunity to further crowd control and transformation effects
The following spells are no longer reflectable

subsections.searchable_text: Other Immunity bubble after changing regions now also prevents debuffs and damage-over-time effects from being applied Being forcefully dismounted now cleanses crowd control and transformation effects, and provides a two-second immunity to further crowd control and transformation effects The following spells are no longer reflectable Burning Field (all Fire Staffs) Fire Artillery (all Fire Staffs) Frozen Hell (Icicle Staff) Hellfire Potion Inner Shadow (Shadowcaller) Nasty Wounds (Hood of Tenacity) Raging Storm (Bow of Badon) Thorn Growth (all Nature Staffs) Wall of Flames (all Fire Staffs)

sections.heading: Fixes
sections.description: Note: The tooltip for Sanctify (Exalted Staff) currently displays incorrectly. This issue will be addressed in an upcoming patch.

subsections.heading: Spell fixes

items.text: Added missing AoE escalation to the following spells
Empowering Beam (all Arcane Staffs): Fixed issue where damage buff would not stack if two players targeted the same player simultaneously
Backhand Strike (all War Gloves): Fixed issue where the same target could be hit multiple times
Blind Spot (Shoes of Tenacity): Fixed issue where invisibility would persist while attacking or casting
Fixed issue where the VFX of damage-over-time or healing-over-time spells would prematurely disappear after the affected player shapeshifted into human form

subsections.searchable_text: Spell fixes Added missing AoE escalation to the following spells Burning Field (all Fire Staffs) Combustion (Infernal Staff) Counter (all War Gloves) Crush Charge (Duskweaver Boots) Electric Discharge (Judicator Helmet) Flame Blast (all Fire Staffs) Inner Shadow (Shadowcaller) Pyroblast (one-handed Fire Staff) Snare Charge (all Maces) Tackle (Great Hammer) Triple Kick (all War Gloves) Empowering Beam (all Arcane Staffs): Fixed issue where damage buff would not stack if two players targeted the same player simultaneously Backhand Strike (all War Gloves): Fixed issue where the same target could be hit multiple times Blind Spot (Shoes of Tenacity): Fixed issue where invisibility would persist while attacking or casting Fixed issue where the VFX of damage-over-time or healing-over-time spells would prematurely disappear after the affected player shapeshifted into human form

subsections.heading: UI fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where the Embalmed Tiger skin did not display in the Appearance UI
[iOS] Fixed issue where tapping a search result in the Travel Planner UI would not autocomplete the destination

subsections.searchable_text: UI fixes Fixed issue where the Embalmed Tiger skin did not display in the Appearance UI [iOS] Fixed issue where tapping a search result in the Travel Planner UI would not autocomplete the destination

subsections.heading: Other fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where some Steam achievements would not register as unlocked when completed on mobile
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes

subsections.searchable_text: Other fixes Fixed issue where some Steam achievements would not register as unlocked when completed on mobile Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
